gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved with no findings and confirmed the helper keeps connector submit failure semantics and serving/scheduling ownership with the connector.
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_engine.py tests/test_workflow.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q -> 105 passed
what_changed: Added `prepare_and_submit_to_engine(...)` to `DocumentKVService` for validated `EngineReadyRequest` preparation plus connector submission.
Added the same end-to-end helper to `DocumentKVWorkflow`, including training-artifact adapter propagation through the existing preparation path.
Documented the vLLM/SGLang connector handoff helper and added service/workflow tests.
why: Cachet needs an intuitive workflow that reaches the established serving-engine handoff boundary while keeping scheduling and decode inside vLLM, SGLang, or other connector implementations.
